test.name: Alert Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Alert Should Not Be Present
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Alert Text: Press a button! Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Press a button!} (Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afa8596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb2e84f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad2b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad3a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b050d3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b0507a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b052bca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff472ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff4fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff175c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that no alert is present.
kw.status: ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.

test.status: ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.
